message.content:
@startuml
actor Administrator
participant "SpecifyNewVaccineUI" as SpecifyNewVaccineUI
participant "SpecifyNewVaccineController" as SpecifyNewVaccineController
participant "Company" as Company
participant "VaccineStore" as VaccineStore
participant "vc:Vaccine" as vc_Vaccine
participant "admPro:AdministrationProcess" as admPro_AdministrationProcess
participant "VaccineTypeStore" as VaccineTypeStore
participant "VaccineType" as VaccineType

Administrator -> SpecifyNewVaccineUI: 1 starts specifying a new vaccine and its administration process
SpecifyNewVaccineUI -> SpecifyNewVaccineController: 2 createVaccine()
SpecifyNewVaccineController -> Company: 3 typeList = getVaccineTypeList()
Company -> Company: 4 getVaccineTypeList()
Company -> VaccineTypeStore: loop for all known vaccineTypes
VaccineTypeStore -> VaccineType: 5 VaccineType(code,name)
VaccineTypeStore --> Company
Company --> SpecifyNewVaccineController
SpecifyNewVaccineController -> SpecifyNewVaccineUI: 6 request data (name, manufacturer, type, age groups,doses,elapsing interval, dosage) and show vaccineType list
SpecifyNewVaccineUI -> Administrator: 7 types requested data
Administrator -> SpecifyNewVaccineUI: 8 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
SpecifyNewVaccineUI -> SpecifyNewVaccineController: 9 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
SpecifyNewVaccineController -> VaccineStore: 10 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
VaccineStore -> vc_Vaccine: 11 vc = createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
vc_Vaccine -> admPro_AdministrationProcess: loop for all age groups
admPro_AdministrationProcess -> admPro_AdministrationProcess: 12 administrationProcess(minAge,maxAge,numberOfDoses,dosage,timeElapsed)
admPro_AdministrationProcess --> vc_Vaccine
vc_Vaccine -> vc_Vaccine: 13 validate(vaccine)
vc_Vaccine --> VaccineStore
VaccineStore -> VaccineStore: 14 update(vaccine)
VaccineStore --> SpecifyNewVaccineController
SpecifyNewVaccineController -> SpecifyNewVaccineUI: 15 shows data and request confirmation
SpecifyNewVaccineUI -> Administrator: 16 confirms data
Administrator -> SpecifyNewVaccineUI: 17 saveVaccine()
SpecifyNewVaccineUI -> SpecifyNewVaccineController: 18 saveVaccine()
SpecifyNewVaccineController -> Company: 19 saveVaccine()
Company -> VaccineStore: 20 addVaccine()
VaccineStore --> SpecifyNewVaccineController
SpecifyNewVaccineController -> SpecifyNewVaccineUI
SpecifyNewVaccineUI -> Administrator: 21 informs operation (in)success
@enduml
